steps.title: Follow the phrase by doing so
steps.content: The underlined sentence says Coleman gained valuable insights by relying on interviews with coal miners and their families. It explains the benefit she received from using oral histories in her book.

steps.title: Rule out unrelated functions
steps.content: A adds a geographical fact, B claims Coleman is being presented as a politics expert, and C says the sentence presents a major historical event. None describes the sentence's role. The answer is D.
